title: Collection Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in every <collections_dir>/<id>.md file. A collection bundles multiple source URLs for batch ingest — all items are fetched, parsed, and merged into the wiki together.
x-file-example:
---
id: transformer_reading_list
collection: collection
title: "Transformer Architecture Reading List"
items:
  - https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762
  - https://jalammar.github.io/illustrated-transformer/
description: "Core papers and guides for understanding transformer architecture."
sources:
  - "[[attention_is_all_you_need]]"
  - "[[illustrated_transformer]]"
concepts:
  - "[[transformer_architecture]]"
  - "[[attention_mechanism]]"
date_ingested: 2026-06-04
tags:
  - transformers
  - reading-list
---

## Description
What this collection covers and why these sources were grouped together.

## Sources
- [[attention_is_all_you_need]] — original "Attention Is All You Need" paper
- [[illustrated_transformer]] — visual walkthrough of the transformer architecture

## Key concepts covered
- [[transformer_architecture]] — core architecture introduced across all items
- [[attention_mechanism]] — self-attention explained from first principles

## Notes

id.description: Snake_case ID used as the filename and in [[wikilinks]]

collection.description: Node type — used by Obsidian-style apps to filter nodes by collection

title.description: Human-readable title for the collection (e.g. 'Transformer Reading List')

items.description: Ordered list of URLs to fetch and ingest. May also include [[wikilinks]] to already-ingested source nodes.

description.description: One-sentence summary of what this collection covers and why these sources are grouped

sources.description: [[wikilink]] references to source nodes created or updated during ingest of this collection. Populated automatically after ingest.

concepts.description: Aggregated [[wikilink]] references to all concept nodes touched across all items in this collection. Populated automatically after ingest.

date_ingested.description: ISO date when this collection was first ingested (YYYY-MM-DD)
